prompt: Yesterday's deploy went out with every service missing its environment variables and probing the default /healthz path, even though the manifest plainly sets env and check_path for the api service — I triple-checked the JSON, it's exactly what the release tool emits (there's a verbatim sample at the top of the test file). No parse error, no validation error, Load just shrugs and returns services with those parts blank. Replicas, ports, images all load fine, which makes it weirder. Figure out what manifest.go is doing and fix it. Proof = `go test -race -timeout 30s ./...` green, and manifest_test.go stays exactly as it is.
